summary: Iteration 250 - Photo URL PATCH Fix Testing. Verified the fix for profile picture and bio updates reverting to old data on digital card. The root cause was duplicate PATCH /users/{user_id} routes and server.py not clearing photo_path/photo_avatar_path when photo_url was updated. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend my-account page loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: server.py PATCH /api/users/{user_id} now correctly clears photo_path and photo_avatar_path when photo_url is updated via $unset operation
allowed_fields expanded to include timezone, address, city, state, zip_code, country (matching auth.py)
Response properly serializes ObjectId fields (_id, organization_id, org_id, store_id, partner_id)
resolve_user_photo() in image_urls.py prioritizes photo_path > photo_avatar_path > photo_url, so clearing photo_path is essential for new photo_url to take effect
refreshUserData in my-account.tsx now syncs auth store with setUser() after fetching updated user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo URL PATCH fix fully tested and working. The key fix is in server.py lines 354-360 where $unset is used to clear photo_path and photo_avatar_path when photo_url is in the update payload. This ensures resolve_user_photo() returns the new photo_url instead of the old cached photo_path. Bio updates via PUT /api/users/{user_id}/persona also persist correctly to card data.

photo_url_patch_fix: test_patch_allowed_fields - PASSED (timezone, address, city, state, zip_code, country)
frontend: My Address section visible with test data - PASSED

bug_fix_verified.issue: Profile Picture and Bio updates showing 'success' but reverting to old data on digital card
bug_fix_verified.root_cause: server.py PATCH /api/users/{user_id} was NOT clearing photo_path/photo_avatar_path when photo_url was updated. Since resolve_user_photo() prioritizes photo_path over photo_url, the digital card kept showing the old cached image.
bug_fix_verified.fix_details: Added $unset operation to clear photo_path and photo_avatar_path when photo_url is in the update payload
bug_fix_verified.verification: All 9 tests pass, card data returns updated photo_url after PATCH
